hooks.command: FILE="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; if [[ "$FILE" == *.ts || "$FILE" == *.tsx || "$FILE" == *.js || "$FILE" == *.jsx ]]; then cd "$(dirname "$FILE")" && npx prettier --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true; fi

INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); CONTENT=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '(.tool_input.content // .tool_input.new_string) // empty'); if [[ -n "$FILE" && "$FILE" != *.env.example && "$FILE" != *.test.* ]]; then if echo "$CONTENT" | grep -qE '(sk-[a-zA-Z0-9]{20,}|AKIA[A-Z0-9]{16}|ghp_[a-zA-Z0-9]{36}|ghs_[a-zA-Z0-9]{36}|eyJ[a-zA-Z0-9_-]{10,}\.[a-zA-Z0-9_-]{10,}\.[a-zA-Z0-9_-]{10,}|-----BEGIN (RSA |EC |OPENSSH )?PRIVATE KEY|password["\x27]?\s*[:=]\s*["\x27][^"\x27${}]{6,}["\x27]|secret["\x27]?\s*[:=]\s*["\x27][^"\x27${}]{6,}["\x27]|api[_-]?key["\x27]?\s*[:=]\s*["\x27][^"\x27${}]{6,}["\x27])'; then echo "BLOCKED: potential hardcoded secret in $FILE — use env vars via .env.local; placeholders go in .env.example" >&2; exit 2; fi; fi
